title: HTML elements should include a valid language attribute
description: HTML elements should have a valid language attributeAnalyze your codeintentionality-logicalreliabilityCode SmellaccessibilityreactHTML documents should have a valid IETF’s BCP 47langattribute.Why is this an issue?How can I fix it?More InfoScreen readers require a specified language to function correctly. Without it, they default to the user’s set language, causing issues for multilingual users. Specifying a valid language ensures correct pronunciation and a less confusing experience.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIAvailable Since10.6Analyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since10.6©2025SonarSource Sàrl.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: HTML elements should include a valid language attribute.
